sentences.arabic: تَلْعَبُ العَائِلَةُ دَوْرًا مَرْكَزِيًّا فِي حَيَاةِ الفَرْدِ العَرَبِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Porodica igra centralnu ulogu u životu arapskog pojedinca.
sentences.translationEn: Family plays a central role in the life of the Arab individual.

sentences.arabic: يَعِيشُ الأَبْنَاءُ مَعَ وَالِدَيْهِمْ لِفَتْرَةٍ طَوِيلَةٍ غَالِبًا.
sentences.translation: Djeca često dugo žive sa svojim roditeljima.
sentences.translationEn: Children often live with their parents for a long time.

sentences.arabic: يَحْتَرِمُ الصَّغِيرُ الكَبِيرَ وَيَسْعَى الجَمِيعُ لِمُسَاعَدَةِ بَعْضِهِمُ البَعْضِ.
sentences.translation: Mlađi poštuju starije i svi nastoje pomagati jedni drugima.
sentences.translationEn: The young respect the old, and everyone strives to help one another.

sentences.arabic: يَقْضِي الأَقَارِبُ عُطْلَةَ نِهَايَةِ الأُسْبُوعِ فِي الزِّيَارَاتِ العَائِلِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Rođaci provode vikend u porodičnim posjetama.
sentences.translationEn: Relatives spend the weekend on family visits.

sentences.arabic: هَذِهِ الرَّوَابِطُ القَوِيَّةُ تَمْنَحُ الفَرْدَ الشُّعُورَ بِالأَمَانِ.
sentences.translation: Ove snažne veze daju pojedincu osjećaj sigurnosti.
sentences.translationEn: These strong bonds give the individual a sense of security.
